title: Paraceterach delavayi
taxonomy: Paraceterach delavayi is a member of the Pteridophyta division, which includes ferns and their allies. It belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, a large family of ferns commonly known as the polypody fern family. This classification places Paraceterach delavayi within the order Polypodiales, a group of ferns characterized by a unique type of spore production. The genus Paraceterach is thought to be closely related to the genus Ceterach, and some sources may group them together. Further classification within the species is still a subject of ongoing research and possible reevaluation.
